risk_title: Insecurity Disrupting PHC Service Delivery in Northern States
risk_summary: Security challenges are affecting health service delivery in certain states, requiring alternative service delivery models such as mobile brigades and temporary health posts for displaced communities.
evidence_quote: In Zamfara state, Mobile Brigades consisting of healthcare workers were established to ensure PHC services in security-challenged areas, alongside creating temporary health posts for communities displaced by insecurity in some LGAs.

risk_title: Displacement and Access Barriers in Conflict-Affected Areas
risk_summary: Communities displaced by insecurity in certain LGAs face barriers to accessing essential health services, requiring project adaptation to establish temporary service delivery points.
evidence_quote: In Zamfara state, Mobile Brigades consisting of healthcare workers were established to ensure PHC services in security-challenged areas, alongside creating temporary health posts for communities displaced by insecurity in some LGAs.

risk_title: Land Acquisition Disputes and Grievances Related to PHC Upgrades
risk_summary: PHC revitalization and construction activities have introduced land acquisition risks that may not yet be fully confirmed, with land disputes already among the top grievances received by the project.
evidence_quote: The revitalization and construction of health facilities have introduced new activities that may involve land acquisition, although this has not yet been confirmed. To manage associated risks, awarded contracts are under review and a social assessment will be conducted to determine the extent of land acquisition... Common grievances raised include land disputes, service delivery, and contractor delays.

risk_title: Inadequate GBV Prevention Measures and Worker Code of Conduct Compliance
risk_summary: Gender-based violence codes of conduct have not been signed by all workers and site engineers on PHC upgrade projects, creating safeguarding gaps in project implementation.
evidence_quote: The mission noted that GBV codes of conduct to prevent gender-based violence (GBV) were not signed by all workers and site engineers.

risk_title: Weak Grievance Management for SEA/SH Complaints
risk_summary: While the project has established grievance mechanisms, awareness and accessibility of tools for reporting sexual exploitation/abuse and sexual harassment (SEA/SH) complaints remain inadequate.
evidence_quote: To improve grievance handling including SEA/SH related complaints, awareness campaigns and the provision of tools such as toll-free lines, visible signage, and complaint boxes labeled in local languages are recommended.
